title: Zelda Horse Behavior
description: Embrace the brand-new Zelda-like horse taming mechanics!
body:
Inspired by The Legend of Zelda

Tired of the vanilla horse taming mechanics?

Let’s try this fresh and immersive taming system!

- Now, your wild horses will be wary of players, just like in *The Legend of Zelda*, and similar to *Flee On Sight* . - If you approach them too recklessly, they will get scared and bolt away. - Sneaking will make it much easier to close the distance. - Approach slowly and carefully before the horse notices you. - Once you're close enough, right-click with a saddle to mount and tame the horse! #### More details will be added in future updates.
